message.content:
I notice you've shared a Cloudflare security verification page rather than the Cosmika e-commerce website theme. This appears to be a standard bot protection page that websites display when verifying human visitors, not the actual theme design you're asking about.

To help you recreate the Cosmika e-commerce theme, I would need to see the actual website or design mockups. Could you please provide:

1. A screenshot of the Cosmika theme homepage
2. Or a link to the live website
3. Or design files/mockups of the theme

Once I can see the actual theme, I'll be able to provide the detailed technical description you're looking for, including:
- Exact color scheme with hex values
- Header design specifications
- Navigation structure details
- Hero section layout
- Product card designs
- Typography specifications
- Footer design
- All UI elements and spacing details
- And the overall aesthetic approach

Please share the actual theme visuals so I can give you the comprehensive developer-focused description you need.
